title: NATIONAL MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS SOCIETY - 211info
text: NATIONAL MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS SOCIETY OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON CHAPTER NATIONAL MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS SOCIETY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides navigator services, programs, and connection opportunities such as self-help and support groups for individuals affected by multiple sclerosis (MS). Confidential Address Eligibility: Individuals living with MS Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Chat: Monday-Friday 6am-4pm Email (800) 344-4867 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 344-4867 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information or to chat with an MS Navigator FEES: Free DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Multiple Sclerosis Navigator Programs * Multiple Sclerosis Specialized Information and Referral * Multiple Sclerosis If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
